understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding any spikes ('u'/'v') that immediately end the run on contact, and then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, staying within the 2-attempt and 50-turn constraints per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or a CLICK; after any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hit a hazard (spikes end the attempt), or reach the goal (+). CLICK targets a specific [x,y] to remove breakable/clickable blocks (e.g., 'x') and does not move the player; UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning relies on the state’s left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan to predict where a move will ultimately land (including passage drops to different y-levels) and to choose safe, efficient moves toward progress.
